fieldIssues.evidenceQuote: labels: name "Artists House", catalogNumber "AH 7" (release date 1979, country US, sim 1.0)

notes: MB search sim 1.0, artist James Blood Ulmer, title Tales of Captain Black, date 1979 (US) — all match. All 4 keyTracks (Theme From Captain Black, Revelation March, Moons Shine, Morning Bride) present in MB tracklist. Label discrepancy: ours=DIW, MB=Artists House (cat AH 7). The original 1979 US release was on Artists House; DIW was a later (Japanese) reissue label, so ours labels the album by its reissue. Flagged as factual_error on label per the entity-matched MB original-release evidence. albumDNA's harmolodic framing and named personnel (Ornette Coleman alto, Denardo Coleman drums) are not in evidence (no personnel) — unverifiable, not flagged.

So the album's own substantive facts — year 1980, label Elektra Musician, and the 4 keyTracks (African Marketplace, Zimbabwe, The Wedding, Soweto) — cannot be checked against any surviving evidence. The album-specific editorial lines (introduced Ibrahim to American audiences; positive energy vs apartheid) are opinion. unverifiable: correct entity, no contradiction, but the album metadata/tracklist is unconfirmable. The evidence stored_url was the artist page (correct person) but ours.wikipediaUrl is null, so none_stored.

fieldIssues.evidenceQuote: Kansas City 8: Get Together is a 1979 studio album by Count Basie.

notes: Entity confirmed: MB embedded releaseGroup 'Get Together' + correct Wikipedia page 'Kansas City 8: Get Together' (Count Basie, Pablo). All 5 keyTracks (Ode to Pres, Basie's Bag, Swinging on the Cusp, Like It Used to Be, My Main Men) match both MB and wiki tracklists exactly. Year conflict: ours field = 1986; the entity-matched Wikipedia page states verbatim '1979 studio album by Count Basie' and the albumDNA itself says '1979 session'. MB releaseGroup firstReleaseDate = 1986 (the evidence release is a German CD, cat CD 2310-924, with blank date) — this likely reflects a CD reissue rather than the original 1979 Pablo release. Flagged factual_error on year because the field (1986) contradicts the canonical album-year per wiki (1979) and the album's own prose; confidence held moderate due to the conflicting MB firstReleaseDate. A human should set year to 1979 (original) unless the dataset convention is to use reissue years. wikipediaUrl correct.
